name: Annie Mae Jones' Sweet Potato Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt into mixing bowl. Cut in shortening.
3. Add potatoes and mix thoroughly, then add enough milk to make a soft dough.
4. Turn out onto a lightly floured board and roll out to about 1/2 inch thickness. Cut into squares.
5. Place squares not touching on ungreased baking sheet. Bake in preheated oven for 12-15 minutes.
6. Serve warm, split, and spread with room-temperature butter.
